name: A086377 — The BDS Sequence
description: The star of the Bosma–Dekking–Steiner theorem (Integers, 2018). This (1,1,3,2)-hiccup sequence has four equivalent characterizations: recursive hiccup definition, positions of 1 in the fixed point of 0→10, 1→100, the Beatty sequence ⌊(1+√2)n − √2/2⌋, and an iterated function sequence starting from 4/π via Lambert's continued fraction. That a sequence from π equals a Beatty sequence with slope 1+√2 was verified numerically over 130,000 terms before being proved.
